name: soil_profile_methods
description: Description of methods used to obtain profile data

name: distrib_restrictions
description: Distribution limitations for the soils data set

name: revision_date_first_sl
description: Date the file was first created

name: revision_date_latest_sl
description: Date the file was last modified

name: revision_notes_sl
description: Notes describing reasons for the revision

name: researcher_last_name
description: Last name of researchers involved with the experiment(s) or data

name: researcher_first_name
description: First name of researchers involved with the experiment(s) or data

name: researcher_name_mi
description: Middle initial of researchers involved with the experiment(s) or data

name: researcher_role
description: Role of researcher in experiment or dataset preparation

name: name_of_soil_profile
description: Name of soil profile, usually the soil series name or equivalent. Use soil_site for specific profile locations.

name: soil_site
description: Name of site where soil profile data sampled

name: soil_location_country
description: First admin for location of site for soil profile (usually country)

name: soil_loc_2nd_level
description: Second admin level for location of site for soil profile (usually state or province)

name: soil_loc_3rd_level
description: Third admin level for location of site for soil profile (usually county or municipality)

name: soil_sampling_date
description: Date soil was sampled in field (e.g., for profile description)

name: soil_evaporation_limit
description: Soil evaporation, upper limit for stage 1

name: summer_u
description: Summer soil evaporation, upper limit for stage 1

name: winter_u
description: Winter soil evaporation, upper limit for stage 1

name: drainage_rate_per_day
description: Drainage rate as fraction per day

name: soil_surface_color
description: Surface soil color, moist, using Munsell hue

name: soil_fertility_on_photo
description: Soil fertility effect on photosynthesis (0 to 1 scale)

name: soil_ID
description: Unique soil identifier linking to SOIL_PROFILES

name: soil_color_moist_Munsell
description: Soil color of moist soil using Munsell hue

name: soil_clay_fraction
description: Soil texture, clay (<0.002 mm), weight percent of fine earth

name: soil_active_C
description: Biologically active soil organic carbon by layer, expressed as g[C]/100g[soil]

name: soil_intermediate_C
description: Intermediate soil organic carbon by layer, expressed as g[C]/100g[soil]

name: soil_stable_C
description: Stable organic carbon by layer, expressed as g[C]/100g[soil]

name: soil_inert_C
description: Inert organic carbon by layer, expressed as g[C]/100g[soil]

name: soil_active_C_fraction
description: Biologically active soil organic carbon by layer, fraction of total organic C

name: soil_intermediate_C_fraction
description: Intermediate soil organic carbon by layer, fraction of total organic C

name: soil_stable_C_fraction
description: Stable organic carbon by layer, fraction of total organic C

name: soil_inert_C_fraction
description: Inert organic carbon by layer, fraction of total organic C

name: soil_silt_fraction
description: Soil texture, silt (0.05 to 0.002 mm), weight percent of fine earth

name: soil_sand_fraction
description: Soil texture, sand (0.05 to 2.0 mm), weight percent of fine earth

name: soil_coarse_fraction
description: Soil texture, coarse fraction (>2 mm), weight percent of fine earth

name: soil_organic_C_perc_layr
description: Total soil organic carbon by layer, expressed as g[C]/100g[soil]

name: soil_organic_matter_layer
description: Total soil organic matter by layer

name: soil_pH_in_buffer
description: pH of soil measured in buffer solution, from profile description

name: soil_pH_in_water
description: pH of soil in water, from profile description

name: soil_bulk_density_moist
description: Soil bulk density with volume determined when soil is moist (approx. 33 kPa = 1/3 bar)

name: soil_water_wilting_pt
description: Soil water content (wilting point) at 15 atmosphere pressure

name: soil_water_field_cap_1
description: Soil water content at 1/3 atmosphere pressure

name: soil_water_field_cap_2
description: Soil water content at 1/10 atmospheric pressure

name: layer_drainage_rate_per_day
description: Drainage rate as fraction per day, per layer

name: root_growth_factor_soil
description: Root growth factor, soil only (0 to 1 scale)

name: soil_water_uptake_factor
description: Root exploration factor (0 to 1 scale, APSIM XF)

name: soil_compac_fact_by_lyr
description: Soil compaction factor by layer (0 to 1 scale)

name: NH4soil_kCl
description: NH4 in soil based on KCl extraction, by layer

name: nitrate_KCl
description: Nitrate in soil based on KCl extraction, by layer

name: soil_aluminum_conc
description: Soil aluminum concentration in profile described

name: plant_root_uptake_factor
description: APSIM plant specific water uptake coefficient
